ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label for the organization */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organization */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., local government, private company) */,
  "organisation_address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning application */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date permission was granted */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission granted (e.g., full, outline) */,
  "permission_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning application */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., permissioned, pending decision) */,
  "status_update_date" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site plan entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning application */,
  "siteplan_url" TEXT /* URL for the site plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the site plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazardous_substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazardous substance entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning application */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the hazardous substance */,
  "substance_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the hazardous substance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_sizes" (
  "land_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land size entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning application */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Size of the land in hectares */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning history entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning application */,
  "planning_history" TEXT /* Historical notes regarding the planning application */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic coordinate entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning application */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* Geographic X coordinate */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* Geographic Y coordinate */,
  "coordinate_source" TEXT /* Source of the geographic coordinates (e.g., GPS, mapping software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, planner, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_repository" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning application */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL for the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning application */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)
